annotations.notes: Céramide 3 + Acide Hyaluronique + Acétyl Hexapeptide-8 Acétylé confirmed in INCI.
Concentration-ordered INCI (water/glycerin/SH leading). Pure HA serum, no other actives.
SODIUM HYALURONATE confirmed.
Product name 'Retinoid Eye Serum' + DB confirm retinoids; SODIUM HYALURONATE visible.

Alphabetical INCI (Korean convention). Full-scan tags reliable; sensoriels unrated. 3-O-ethyl ascorbic acid, alpha-arbutin, ceramide NP, curcuma longa. Betaine salicylate functional (Anua HP70 marketed as niacinamide+BHA serum). No tocopherol.
3-O-ETHYL ASCORBIC ACID (vit-c); ALPHA-ARBUTIN+ARBUTIN (tyrosinase); CERAMIDE NP; DIMETHYLSILANOL HYALURONATE; CAMELLIA SINENSIS+CENTELLA (polyphenols); BETAINE SALICYLATE top-8 (bha).
TOCOPHEROL; VITIS VINIFERA + POLYGONUM CUSPIDATUM + CAMELLIA SINENSIS top 23-26 (polyphenols full-scan); fluid sunscreen aqueux.
GLYCOLIC ACID pos-4 (aha); RETINAL (retinaldehyde = retinoid); tocopherol confirmed by DB.
SODIUM HYALURONATE + ACETYL HEXAPEPTIDE-8 visible. 7-ingredient formula = very light.
Lip stick with mineral oil, beeswax, shea, microcrystalline wax = rich. vitamin-e unrated (tocopherol not visible in 500-char INCI).
Polypeptide De Glycine Max confirmed in full INCI (pos-22, past 500-char truncation). kind=cleanser = rinse-off, texture sensoriel unrated.
CAMELLIA SINENSIS SEED OIL (polyphenols); TOCOPHEROL visible; toner format (texture-legere).
Protéase listed in full INCI (not visible in first 500 chars). Orchestrator correctly detects via normalize('protéase')→'protease' match.
SODIUM HYALURONATE + TOCOPHERYL ACETATE confirmed. SPF cream = moderate texture but DB says legere.
GLUCONOLACTONE pos-11 (past positionCap:10 — orchestrator FN, but product marketed as PHA pad); HYALURONIC ACID + SODIUM HYALURONATE; BETAINE SALICYLATE pos-5 (bha).
Retinol pos-10, ascorbyl tetraisopalmitate + sodium ascorbyl phosphate, tocopherol. Glycine soja oil pos-6 → veg-oil exclusion → texture-legere absent. Lactic acid pos-35 = pH adjuster.
ROSMARINUS OFFICINALIS (rosemary = rosmarinic acid, polyphenol); TOCOPHERYL ACETATE. 'SODIUM HYDRALURONATE' (typo) present but orchestrator likely misses it — unrated.
TOCOPHEROL confirmed. No peptides in INCI (full list visible and complete). Negative sample for peptides — correct.

SODIUM HYALURONATE confirmed. After-sun lotion. texture-legere removed 2026-05-11: INCI shows MINERAL OIL pos 3 + SQUALANE pos 4 + CETEARYL ALCOHOL emulsion = creme formulation. Marketing-driven 'light' annotation contradicted by INCI signal — gold-set must stay INCI-verifiable.

Product name '0.1% Gentle Retinol Serum' confirms retinol (INCI truncated before retinol appears). vitamin-e by DB (tocopherol in truncated INCI). BAKUCHIOL present but excluded from retinoids per calibration.
ACIDE 3-O-ÉTHYL ASCORBIQUE visible (vitamin-c). 'A-tinol' in name = retinol (INCI truncated). Other DB tags (ceramides, HA, polyphenols, vit-e) not confirmable from truncated INCI.

ACIDE ASCORBIQUE pos-1; TOCOPHEROL; SODIUM HYALURONATE; ROSMARINUS OFFICINALIS (polyphenol); CERAMIDE NP; ACIDE TRANEXAMIQUE (tyrosinase). Powder ampoule, light texture. [adjust] texture-legere absent: powder ampoule top 1 = ACIDE ASCORBIQUE actif, not aqueous base (detector requires water/glycerin top 3).
TOCOPHEROL; CERAMIDE NP. Hand-cream rich in fatty acids/oils top 8 (palmitic, stearic, macadamia, olivate, polyisobutène) → not texture-legere; <2 butter/wax top 8 → not texture-riche per detector.

Kit 3 produits (essence + gel cream + lip balm). Concatenated INCI: TOCOPHEROL, SODIUM HYALURONATE / ACIDE HYALURONIQUE HYDROLYSE, CAMELLIA SINENSIS (polyphenol), CERAMIDE NP. Texture absent (kit hétérogène). [adjust] texture-legere present: detector emits via concatenated INCI top 3 (essence aqueuse domine).
GLUCONOLACTONE confirmed. Short INCI, no other focus tags.
SODIUM HYALURONATE confirmed. Simple HA essence formula.
Added from Dr Sam's product with structured % concentration claim(s).
SODIUM HYALURONATE confirmed. Full INCI visible — no tocopherol/tocopheryl. Negative sample for vitamin-e — correct. Shea butter is not an isolated vit-e ingredient.
Ceramide NP/AP/EOP. Apricot kernel oil pos-7 → veg-oil exclusion → texture-legere absent. No butter/wax patterns top 8 → texture-riche absent.

Full INCI visible — no sodium hyaluronate. Negative sample for HA — correct. Shea + beeswax eye cream = texture-riche.
GLYCOLIC ACID pos-3 + LACTIC ACID pos-10 (aha). SALICYLIC ACID at pos-14 — past positionCap:10 → bha unrated (low conc, likely antimicrobial). Toner format.
TOCOPHEROL confirmed. Shea + beeswax early in INCI. 'Fluide' version but beeswax confirms richness.
CERAMIDE NP; CURCUMA LONGA+MELIA AZADIRACHTA (polyphenols); ARBUTIN pos-8 (tyrosinase); TOCOPHEROL. vitamin-c and HA unrated (INCI truncated).

GLUCONOLACTONE pos-4 (PHA within cap 10); POLYGONUM CUSPIDATUM + CAMELLIA SINENSIS + ROSMARINUS OFFICINALIS (polyphenols); SODIUM HYALURONATE; TOCOPHEROL. HELIANTHUS pos-5 (heavy oil top 8) → not texture-legere.
LACTIC ACID pos-6 + GLYCOLIC ACID pos-9. Short 12-ingredient INCI.

Full INCI visible — no retinol/retinyl. Negative sample for retinoids — correct. SODIUM HYALURONATE + TOCOPHEROL confirmed. ISOBUTYLAMIDO THIAZOLYL RESORCINOL (Thiamidol) = tyrosinase inhibitor not in scope tags.

Rinse-off cleanser (coco-glucoside + sodium laureth sulfate). Salicylic pos-3, glycolic pos-8, gluconolactone pos-9 — all functional within rinse-off cap 20. Sensoriel unrated. Kind corrected 2026-05-11 (was spot-treatment).
LACTIC ACID pos-3 + MANDELIC ACID pos-5 (aha); HYDROLYZED HYALURONIC ACID. Light peel serum.
BACILLUS FERMENT (enzyme exfoliant signal); SODIUM HYALURONATE; DIPEPTIDE DIAMINOBUTYROYL BENZYLAMIDE DIACETATE (Syn-Ake) + ACETYL HEXAPEPTIDE-8 (peptides); ARNICA+CITRUS (polyphenols); TOCOPHEROL.

Coffret 2 produits (PSCHITT + ETOILE DU JOUR). PAPAIN (enzyme-exfoliant) + CAMELLIA SINENSIS LEAFWATER (polyphenol) côté PSCHITT; ACETYL HEXAPEPTIDE-8 + HYDROLYZED HYALURONIC ACID côté ETOILE. Texture absent (kit). [adjust] texture-legere present: detector emits via concatenated INCI top 3 (PSCHITT aqueux domine).
Hydrolyzed HA + sodium HA. Oligopeptide-1 pos-9, tocopherol pos-8. Helianthus annuus seed oil pos-12 (past 8) — texture-legere passes. Croton lechleri not in polyphenol patterns.

balm kind → texture-legere unrated. Cica balm with cyclomethicones + squalane — no butter/wax pattern top 8 → texture-riche absent. Torreya nucifera seed oil pos-19 (past 8). Madecassoside/asiaticoside don't match peptide patterns.
Mica + Silica + Aluminum Starch Octenylsuccinate = classic mattifying compact. TOCOPHEROL confirmed.
ASCORBIC ACID pos-4 confirmed. Lactic acid pos-9 in 11-ingredient formula — likely pH adjuster, aha unrated.
Flavo-C is L-ascorbic acid pos-3. Tocopherol pos-7, hydrolyzed HA. Tetradecyl Aminobutyroyl... = peptide-like Trifluoroacetate but no 'peptide' substring → peptides absent.
TRANEXAMIC ACID + 4-BUTYLRESORCINOL (tyrosinase); GLUCONOLACTONE pos-3 (pha); TOCOPHEROL+TOCOPHERYL ACETATE. Mandelic acid pos-13 (past cap) — aha unrated.
RETINYL PALMITATE visible; SODIUM HYALURONATE; SILICA pos-7 (fini-mat). Peptides unrated (INCI truncated). DB tags peptides.

Cleanser → sensoriels unrated. Glycolic pos-16 + salicylic pos-17 = past cap 10, trace in rinse-off → AHA/BHA absent. Tocopherol + ascorbyl tetraisopalmitate present. Glycyrrhiza glabra not in tyrosinase patterns (ubiquitous, excluded by mechanism).

Cleanser → sensoriels unrated. Salicylic pos-9 within cap 10 = functional in this exfoliant gel. Gluconolactone pos-13 (past 10) → PHA absent. Boswellia serrata not in polyphenol patterns. Tocopherol present.
BOSWELLIA SERRATA (frankincense polyphenols). SALICYLIC ACID pos-19 — past positionCap:10 → bha unrated per design (DB tag is manual override for anti-acne context). Light spot treatment.
CAPRYLOYL SALICYLIC ACID pos-6 (bha). GLUCONOLACTONE at pos-16 — past positionCap:10, likely conditioning not exfoliant → pha unrated.

Tone-up sunscreen. Hexylresorcinol + tranexamic acid = tyrosinase patterns. Vitis vinifera + camellia sinensis + polygonum cuspidatum = polyphenols. Silica pos-12 (past 8) → fini-mat absent. No tocopherol in INCI.
TOCOPHEROL; sunscreen "fluide" — top 3 AQUA/DIBUTYL ADIPATE/UV filter, no heavy oil top 8. SILICA pos-13 past fini-mat cap 8.
TOCOPHEROL visible. Lip balm format.
ZEA MAYS STARCH pos-6 = mattifying. Effaclar H = oily/combination skin moisturizer, light formula.

Toleriane Sensitive: water/glycerin top 2, zea mays starch pos-5 (top 8) → fini-mat. Squalane + dimethicone are not in HEAVY_EXCLUSION → texture-legere passes. Ceramide NP pos-10. No retinol/vit-C/vit-E.
TALC pos-1 + NYLON-12 + TITANIUM DIOXIDE = mineral compact makeup. Clear fini-mat.
Beeswax + shea + castor oil = rich lip balm. TOCOPHEROL (VITAMIN E) explicitly labeled.

ACIDE ASCORBIQUE pos-27 (vitamin-c cap=Inf); PUNICA GRANATUM + VITIS VINIFERA juices (polyphenols full-scan). Top 8 = ≥4 wax/butter (Cire Microcristalline, Beurre Butyrospermum, Cire Synthétique, Cire Euphorbia Cerifera) → texture-riche.
ACIDE HYALURONIQUE HYDROLYSÉ confirmed. Papaïne (papain) in full INCI — not visible in first 500 chars. Orchestrator correctly fires enzymes.
KAOLIN visible (fini-mat). TOCOPHEROL visible. vitamin-c (ASCORBYL PALMITATE) likely past pos-10, unrated.
GLUCONOLACTONE pos-8 (pha); SODIUM HYALURONATE pos-11 (ha). Light serum.
LACTIC ACID pos-10 (exactly at cap). TOCOPHERYL ACETATE confirmed.

FR marketing-prose INCI. "Céramide" générique pos-27 (untyped, post-functional). Detector typed-ceramide only (NP/AP/NS/NG/AS/EOP/EOS/1/2/3/6) — generic mention rejected same rationale que phytosphingosine (0 recall, +32 FP corpus si activé). Ceramides reclassé absent 2026-05-11.

texture-riche removed 2026-05-11: INCI is marketing-prose FR ('Améliore ta routine beauté avec...'), not parseable — gold-set must stay INCI-verifiable. Sun stick form factor already covered by texture-stick (F4 name-driven detector). Category D drift twin of pure-vitamin-c-serum.

Gluconolactone pos-9 within cap 10 → PHA functional. Betaine salicylate pos-12 past cap → BHA absent. No actif-class actives. Hydrogenated polydecene + ethyl hexyl palmitate are emollient esters (not heavy).
BETAINE SALICYLATE pos-8 + SALICYLIC ACID pos-10 (bha); LACTIC ACID pos-9 (aha); SODIUM HYALURONATE; CENTELLA ASIATICA+SCUTELLARIA BAICALENSIS (polyphenols).
ARBUTINE (Arbutin) pos-10 confirmed. Other DB tags (ceramides, HA, polyphenols) unrated — INCI truncated.

Alphabetical Korean INCI. Mask kind → texture-legere unrated (orchestrator excludes mask). Tocopheryl acetate + sodium hyaluronate + rosmarinus officinalis = polyphenol pattern. No salicylic / lactic / gluconolactone.
4-ingredient essence: Eau, Butylène Glycol, Bêta-Glucane, Glycérine. Water top 1 + 0 heavy → texture-legere clear positive. No actives.
Name 'Cica-Hyal' confirms HA (INCI truncated before sodium hyaluronate). Other DB tags unrated.
CACAO+CURCUMA LONGA+MELIA AZADIRACHTA (polyphenols). No retinoids visible and name doesn't say retinoid — retinoids unrated (DB tags it, may be in truncated INCI). Light ampoule.

5-HA serum + multi-peptide complex. Acetyl hexapeptide-8, palmitoyl tripeptide-1, etc. Ascorbyl palmitate, tocopherol, alpha-arbutin, camellia sinensis. Lactic/glycolic acid copolymer pos-41 (past cap, also copolymer not free acid) → AHA absent.

RETINOL visible; ASCORBYL GLUCOSIDE (vit-c); ACETYL HEXAPEPTIDE-8+PALMITOYL TRIPEPTIDE-1+PALMITOYL TETRAPEPTIDE-7 (peptides); CENTELLA ASIATICA (polyphenols). vitamin-e unrated (truncated).

SODIUM HYALURONATE pos-4. Pure HA serum — 15 ingredients.
KAOLIN pos-2 + BENTONITE pos-3 + CHARCOAL pos-6 (fini-mat clay mask); GLUCONOLACTONE pos-7 (PHA within cap, mask rinse-off-like cap 20).
ALPHA-ARBUTIN pos-4 (tyrosinase); CAMELLIA SINENSIS+CENTELLA ASIATICA+COFFEA ARABICA (polyphenols). vitamin-e unrated (truncated).
SODIUM HYALURONATE; ASCORBYL GLUCOSIDE (vit-c); MELISSA OFFICINALIS (lemon balm = polyphenols) visible in INCI. FN: orchestrator misses polyphenols here (passionflower/melissa not in patterns).
Body lotion bio. Helianthus annuus seed oil pos-3 → veg-oil top 8 exclusion → texture-legere absent. Butyrospermum pos-5 + Mangifera pos-8 = 2 butter patterns top 8 → texture-riche.
SODIUM HYALURONATE. Fruit acid sources (bilberry, sugar cane, maple) present but not isolated acids — aha unrated.
GLUCONOLACTONE pos-9 (pha); TAPIOCA STARCH+SILICA (fini-mat). vitamin-e unrated (truncated).
GLUCONOLACTONE pos-7 (pha) within rinse-off cap 20. vitamin-c and vitamin-e not visible in INCI — unrated (INCI truncated). Kind corrected 2026-05-11 (was moisturizer).
Shea butter pos-1 + beeswax pos-3 (texture-riche). TOCOTRIENOLS (VITAMIN E) + VITAMIN C ESTER (ASCORBYL PALMITATE) explicitly labeled. CAMELLIA SINENSIS GREEN TEA OIL (polyphenols).
CERAMIDE AP/AS/EOP/NP/NS (5 types); ACETYL HEPTAPEPTIDE-4; ALUMINUM STARCH OCTENYLSUCCINATE+BORON NITRIDE (fini-mat). HA and vit-e unrated (truncated).

FN: ACIDE ASCORBIQUE 5% pos-2 confirmed — orchestrator does not tag vitamin-c here (DB missing tag). HYALURONATE DE SODIUM pos-1; CURCUMA LONGA+multiple plant extracts (polyphenols). texture-legere removed 2026-05-11: INCI is marketing-prose FR ('Hyaluronate de Sodium liquide, Acide Ascorbique 5%, ...'), not parseable — gold-set must stay INCI-verifiable. vitamin-c FN traced to seed parsing (category D drift).
Alphabetical Korean INCI; sensoriels unrated. 4 palmitoyl peptides, ceramide NP, camellia sinensis. Dipotassium glycyrrhizate not in tyrosinase patterns (excluded by mechanism). No acid molecules.
Body lotion format. Shea butter present but in lotion base — borderline. Trust DB (texture-legere).

French INCI, concentration-ordered. Rétinol pos-13 (full-scan retinoid catches). Acide hyaluronique + hyaluronate de sodium. Camellia sinensis + vitis vinifera. Bakuchiol excluded from retinoid patterns. Tocophérol present.
HYALURONATE DE SODIUM; 4 palmitoyl peptides (peptides); CENTELLA ASIATICA+ASIATICOSIDE (polyphenols). Ceramides unrated (truncated INCI).
SODIUM HYALURONATE; PALMITOYL TETRAPEPTIDE-7+HEXAPEPTIDE-12+TRIPEPTIDE-1+DIPEPTIDE-10; CENTELLA ASIATICA+MADECASSOSIDE. Ceramides unrated (truncated INCI).

Cleanser, French INCI looks marketing-led (tea tree top). Sensoriels unrated. Acide salicylique present + product is anti-acne cleanser → BHA functional. Camellia sinensis + acide laurique (fatty, not AHA). Multiple hyaluronate forms.

GLUCONOLACTONE pos-10 (PHA within rinse-off cap 20); CURCUMA LONGA pos-19 (polyphenol full-scan); SODIUM HYALURONATE + variants. Kind corrected 2026-05-11 (was moisturizer): wash-off pack = rinse-off mask, texture-legere correctly suppressed.
ACÉTATE DE TOCOPHÉRYLE (vitamin-e). Balm format with shea + euphorbia cerifera wax + hydrogenated coconut = clearly texture-riche. DB tags texture-legere incorrectly. FP on texture-legere.
CERAMIDE + CERAMIDE EOP; SODIUM HYALURONATE multiple; TOCOPHEROL; toner aqueux top 3 EAU/GLYCERINE/PHELLODENDRON, no heavy oil top 8.

Cleanser, alphabetical INCI. Marketed as 'Active Skin Repair Step 1'. Ascorbic acid + tocopheryl acetate + papain + lactic + salicylic — all functional in this exfoliant cleanser. Camellia oleifera (tea SEED oil) not in polyphenol patterns (sinensis specifically). Sensoriels unrated.

ZEA MAYS STARCH pos-2 (fini-mat absorbent); roll-on aqueux léger top 3 AQUA/STARCH/GLYCERIN.

Eye cream, alphabetical Korean INCI. Heavy formula chemically: beeswax + microcrystalline wax + paraffin + petrolatum + mineral oil. texture-riche removed 2026-05-11: alphabetical ordering makes position-based detection meaningless (known algorithmic limit, see AUTO-TAGS.md). Palmitoyl tetra/tri-peptide, sodium acetylated hyaluronate, camellia sinensis + curcuma longa.

INCI alphabétique Korean → cap bypass. HYALURONIC ACID + SODIUM HYALURONATE; CURCUMA LONGA (polyphenol); ampoule serum aqueuse. [adjust] texture-legere absent: alphabetical INCI Korean → position-based texture rules N/A.

Enzyme powder cleanser. Papain pos-8 functional. Lactobionic pos-12 within rinse-off PHA cap 20. Sensoriels unrated. Kind corrected 2026-05-11 (was moisturizer): rinse-off → PHA promoted absent→present.
HYALURONATE DE SODIUM confirmed. Propolis/honey/royal jelly essence — short complete INCI.
Product name 'Lactosoy Enzyme' + FILTRAT FERMENTÉ DE LACTOBACILLUS/LAIT DE SOJA → enzymatic cleansing claim confirmed. HA and polyphenols unrated (truncated INCI).
HYALURONATE DE SODIUM; ACÉTYL HEXAPEPTIDE-8 visible; 'Retinol Intense' name confirms retinoids (INCI truncated before retinol).

Multi-product KIT (cleansing gel + clay mask + toner + serum) concatenated INCI. Camellia sinensis dominant + sodium hyaluronate. Acide capryloyl salicylique (BHA pattern) + acide lactobionique (PHA) appear in sub-products only — bha/pha unrated. Sensoriels unrated (composite product).

Chemical-mineral hybrid sunscreen fluide. Silica pos-5 → fini-mat. Aqua top 1 + 0 heavy top 8 (filters/esters/silicones not in HEAVY_EXCLUSION) → texture-legere. Glycine soja oil pos-22 (past 8). Tocopherol + tocopheryl acetate. Beta-carotene excluded from retinoid patterns.

ASCORBYL TETRAISOPALMITATE pos-6 (stable vit-c); SODIUM HYALURONATE. Light ampoule.

TOCOPHEROL ACETATE + TOCOPHEROL; SODIUM HYALURONATE; ETHYLHEXYL FERULATE pos-49 (polyphenol via P1 ferulate pattern); UNDECYLENOYL PHENYLALANINE + DIACETYL BOLDINE (tyrosinase); SILICA pos-9 + BORON NITRIDE pos-10 + ALUMINA + sodium polyacrylate (matifying complex anti-tache, fini-mat present chimiquement); fluide aqueux top 3.
